meaning: adj.都市的,似都市的,其上建有都市的
examples: Violators Will Be Citied or Towed Away at Vehicle Owner's Expense.
In recent years, represented by the Died edition in XinJing paper, many citied and provincial papers began to edit the specific edition of obituary in reporting the obituary notice of common people.
Later, one unconfirmed report said Mr Barrak had been charged and citied an official as saying he had violated laws and committed libel.
